414 M4A M4A_ABRASIONS (M4A) Abrasions/Bruises CHAR 1 Skin condition: other skin problems or lesions present in last 7 days - abrasions/bruises. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
415 M4B M4B_BURNS (M4B) Burns 2nd/3rd Degree CHAR 1 Skin condition: other skin problems or lesions present in last 7 days - burns (second or third degree) 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
416 M4C M4C_OPEN_LESIONS (M4C) Open Lesions Other Than Ulcers/Rashes/Cuts
